things.name: Gateway of India
things.description: 1924 triumphal arch on the waterfront where the last British troops sailed away in 1948

things.name: Elephanta Caves
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 5th-century cave temples to Shiva on an island in Mumbai harbour

things.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus (CST)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Victorian Gothic railway station - a masterpiece of colonial architecture

things.name: Dharavi Slum Tour
things.description: Reality Tours explores Asia's largest slum - 1 million people in 2.1sq km

things.name: Colaba Causeway & Bollywood Mumbai
things.description: Colonial shopping street and film studio tour - Bollywood produces 1,000 films per year

things.name: Marine Drive (Queen's Necklace)
things.description: Art Deco promenade around Back Bay - glittering at night like a string of pearls

things.name: Dabbawala Lunchbox Delivery
things.description: 200,000 lunches delivered daily by 5,000 dabbawalas with near-perfect accuracy

things.name: Juhu Beach & Chowpatty Beach
things.description: Mumbai's beaches at sunset with bhel puri, pani puri and masala corn street food

things.name: Taj Mahal Palace Hotel
things.description: 1903 iconic hotel - have Masala Chai in the Sea Lounge overlooking the Gateway of India

things.name: Sanjay Gandhi National Park
things.description: Urban national park with leopards, ancient Buddhist caves and the Kanheri Caves
